en.extract:
The rufous-browed hemispingus (Poospiza rufosuperciliaris) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.
It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''rufous-browed hemispingus''' ('''''Poospiza rufosuperciliaris''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Tanager|Thraupidae]]. It is [[endemic]] to [[Peru]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
It is threatened by [[habitat destruction|habitat loss]].
